title: Open Please
description: Auto-opens doors, trapdoors, and fence gates without the use of a pressure plate and closes them behind you!
body:
## Overview
Open Please is a lightweight QoL (Quality of Life) mod that auto-opens doors, trapdoors, and fence gates. Doors, trapdoors, and fence gates will open if the player is within one block of it and close. Expect this mod to get a settings menu in the near future!
## Key Features
* Auto-open doors with no need for pressure plates or redstone!
* Supports all variants of doors, trapdoors, and fence gates.
* Toggle auto-opening on or off if you don't need it.
* Works on servers without clients having this mod.
## Dependencies
* [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
* [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
* [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/project/mOgUt4GM)
## Settings
* Mod settings/config can be found at Mods > Open Please (Version 2.0.0 or above only).
